summary: A USCIS how-to public service announcement walking aliens through filing Form G-325R online, using branded ARR title cards, a stock shot of blurred figures, and a screen recording of the myUSCIS account-creation website under a step-by-step instructional voiceover. It carries no music track. On-screen text reads 'ARR Alien Registration Requirement', 'Are you an alien in the United States', 'by creating an online account at', 'myUSCIS', and 'FOR MORE INFO: USCIS.GOV/ALIENREGISTRATION'.
notable_text: ARR Alien Registration Requirement; Are you an alien in the United States; by creating an online account at; myUSCIS; FOR MORE INFO: USCIS.GOV/ALIENREGISTRATION
